question:

1970 సంవత్సరానికి రాష్ట్రాల వారీగా సగటు బియ్యం మరియు మొక్కజొన్న దిగుబడుల పోలికను, రాష్ట్ర పేర్ల ఆధారంగా అక్షర క్రమంలో అందించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.STATE_NAME,
    AVG(fcm.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_rice_yield,
    AVG(fcmin.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_maize_yield
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR fcm ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fcm.GEOGRAPHY_ID
LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR fcmin ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fcmin.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON fcm.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR = 1970
GROUP BY g.STATE_NAME
ORDER BY g.STATE_NAME ASC;

SELECT 
    g.STATE_NAME,
    AVG(fcm.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_rice_yield,
    AVG(fcmin.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_maize_yield
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR fcm ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fcm.GEOGRAPHY_ID
LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR fcmin ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fcmin.GEOGRAPHY_ID

ORDER BY g.STATE_NAME ASC;

ప్రతి సంవత్సరం క్రియాశీల సూర్యకాంతి ఉత్పత్తిని నమోదు చేసిన రాష్ట్రాలు మరియు జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.STATE_NAME, g.DIST_NAME
FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER fs
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fs.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE fs.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT g.STATE_NAME, g.DIST_NAME
FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER fs
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fs.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE fs.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0;

question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులోకి అనువదించండి:
1970లో సూర్యకాంతి ఉత్పత్తిని నివేదించిన జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి, కానీ 1966లో సూర్యకాంతి సాగుకు అంకితమైన భూమి విస్తీర్ణం ఏమీ లేదు.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1966' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0.0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.DIST_NAME, g.STATE_NAME
FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER f
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON f.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR = 1970 
  AND f.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0
  AND f.GEOGRAPHY_ID NOT IN (
    SELECT f2.GEOGRAPHY_ID
    FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER f2
    JOIN DIM_YEAR y2 ON f2.YEAR_ID = y2.YEAR_ID
    WHERE y2.YEAR = 1966 
      AND f2.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0
  );
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT g.DIST_NAME, g.STATE_NAME
FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER f
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON f.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR = 1970 
  AND f.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0
  AND f.GEOGRAPHY_ID NOT IN (
    SELECT f2.GEOGRAPHY_ID
    FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER f2
    JOIN DIM_YEAR y2 ON f2.YEAR_ID = y2.YEAR_ID
    WHERE y2.YEAR = 1966 
      AND f2.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0
  );
error: Mismatch (Order matters: False). Gold count: 296. Pred count: 4.

question: 1970లో సూర్యకాంతి ఉత్పత్తి నివేదించిన, కానీ 1966లో సూర్యకాంతి సాగుకు అంకితమైన భూమి విస్తీర్ణం లేని జిల్లాలు ఏవి?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1966' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0.0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.DIST_NAME
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER sun ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = sun.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE sun.YEAR_ID = 5
AND sun.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0
AND sun.GEOGRAPHY_ID NOT IN (
    SELECT GEOGRAPHY_ID
    FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER
    WHERE YEAR_ID = 1
    AND SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0
);

AND sun.GEOGRAPHY_ID NOT IN (
